notes: Real run results — not aspirational. The SDK <AuthProvider enableStorageSync> redirects roughly every page load a few seconds after mount; e2e/utils/visit.ts catches the first leave and re-navigates, but the sync can fire again and race slower assertions. Which specific checkpoints fail varies run-to-run; the seven below are the ones that failed in the latest run on this login. Flip back to covered once the storage-sync race is solved (likely needs an enableStorageSync=false escape hatch in IblaiProviders for the test env).

checkpoints.description: Authenticated user is redirected from / to /ai-avatar/generate

checkpoints.reason: SDK storage-sync redirect races the assertion

checkpoints.description: Renders search input + populates video grid from main tenant
Search box debounces and re-issues the list-videos request with title=
checkpoints.reason: SDK storage-sync redirect fires after the search input is filled

checkpoints.description: Renders editor, AI Script panel, and AI Help button on mount
Switches between Text / Audio / Files tabs
checkpoints.reason: SDK storage-sync redirect races the tab click assertions

checkpoints.description: Empty state renders Add Prompt button + no-prompts message + tabs
checkpoints.reason: Flaky against SDK storage-sync — passed on prior run, failed this run

checkpoints.description: Catalog results render as cards with title + description
Generate page renders upload pane, voice selector, Generate button
checkpoints.reason: SDK storage-sync redirect catches the slower button assertions

checkpoints.description: My Video Clips page mounts without dev error overlay
Renders voice details form and disabled Create Voice button before upload
checkpoints.reason: Flaky against SDK storage-sync — passed on prior run, failed this run
SDK storage-sync redirect catches the gallery shell render
